basics.name: Laurens Verspeek
basics.label: full-stack developer
basics.summary: Hey, I’m Laurens, a full-stack developer with a background in Computer Science and a passion for building with blockchain and AI. I co-founded Effect.AI, a blockchain-powered micro-tasking platform providing work for thousands of people around the globe. Today I am Head of Development at Nosana, a decentralized GPU compute grid on Solana powering AI inference workloads.

work.name: Nosana
work.summary: Joined Nosana at its inception and leading the development of its decentralized GPU computing platform, combining technical strategy, architecture and team leadership.

work.name: Effect.AI
work.summary: Co-founded Effect.AI and building a global decentralized platform connecting people, businesses and AI through blockchain technology.

work.name: Tappy
work.summary: Co-founded Tappy, a Web3 platform for simple, secure and shareable crypto payment links. Led product and technical development from concept to launch, making crypto payments approachable for people who never want to see an address.

work.name: Itsavirus
work.summary: Led the development of digital platforms for major clients around the world, combining hands-on engineering with technical direction and team leadership.

work.name: Itsavirus
work.summary: Built websites and web applications for clients across the Randstad and beyond, from first pixel to production.

education.summary: Graduated on automated multivariate web design optimization using AI genetic algorithms.
Thesis on detecting malicious websites through geographical consistency of website components.
